summary: W1420 adds a checked closed-map component-fields full-data stable convergence guard tying W978 through W977 into the closed-map route chain. The original four-task product goal remains open.

Required negative fixtures remain incomplete for several premature-success patterns.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
